source: H-028 section 8 + FRESH_HOLDOUT_FREEZE_MANIFEST.md champion freeze (19e05f4) + EVALUATION_PROTOCOL_V2.md section 2
note: Single source of truth for the one-time FRESH first read. Guard lift happens via config change referencing this file — never via override.

S0.definition: point-in-time equal-weight eligible A-share benchmark, same universe protocol as candidates

S1.definition: configs/production_blend.json (trust likely_overfit; evaluated for honesty, not favored)

S2.definition: C3 sleeve rank-median -> per-symbol EMA alpha=0.7 -> min-hold-10 top-10

S3.definition: S2 + D1 low-vol tilt w=0.5 in R2a crash regime only

S4.definition: trailing regime-conditional IC learner, H-023 frozen protocol

first_read_eligibility.calendar: actual exchange trading days from the ingested panel (never calendar-day approximation)
additional_conditions: all frozen candidates produced decisions for required dates (or batch-scored by the frozen checkpoints under validated >=0.99 feature fidelity)
no missing performance intervals that materially bias comparison
all artifact hashes valid vs frozen_candidate_manifest.json

final_and_gates: DSR significant under cumulative trial correction (N from HYPOTHESIS_REGISTRY cumulative table at read time; >=115 as of 2026-07-13)
positive net excess return vs S0 at 15 bps
25 bps degradation <= 40% of 8 bps annualized (ACCEPTANCE_RULES R3.2)
capacity passes at CNY 1M and 10M (10% ADV participation)
beta and Jensen alpha reported (pure beta amplification is not improvement)
read_protocol: each candidate evaluated EXACTLY once on the FRESH window (variant C, corrected simulator, 8/15/25 bps; sqrt-impact reported as diagnostic overlay), results recorded regardless of outcome; no re-runs, no parameter changes, no relative winner that fails a hard gate
